commit.message:
fix: register service worker via SerwistProvider for iOS PWA

The service worker was built but never registered — SerwistProvider
from @serwist/next/react was missing. Also adds manifest id field
for stable iOS 16.4+ PWA identity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: disable navigationPreload for iOS PWA + sync-complete event

- Disable navigationPreload in SW (broke iOS standalone mode + offline)
- Move themeColor from metadata to viewport export (Next.js warning)
- Emit sync-complete event after syncPendingMutations succeeds
- CaeTab listens for sync-complete to refresh data immediately

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: add alembic files to backend Dockerfile for railway up deploys

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: video upload webm support + PWA standalone mode preservation

- Add "webm" to CAE_ALLOWED_TYPES (backend rejected MediaRecorder output)
- Add 5min timeout to file upload requests (was 30s global default)
- Replace hard location.href redirects with event-based auth-logout pattern
- Use router.replace instead of router.push for PWA navigation stability
- Add viewport export to root layout for iOS PWA rendering

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: PWA login scope, video upload corruption, CAE form responsiveness

- Move PWA meta tags from terrain layout to root layout metadata API
  so Safari sees them on /login (standalone mode works)
- Fix video upload: skip File double-wrapping when compressImage returns
  original file unchanged (compressed === file check)
- Make CAE/VT form responsive: sidebar collapses to horizontal scroll
  on mobile, wizard grids stack vertically on small screens

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: update PROGRESS.md with PWA Sessions 1-4 completion

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: offline file uploads with image/video compression (Session 4)

Photos compressed via Canvas API (5MB→300KB), videos capped at 1Mbps
bitrate (15MB→6MB). Files queue in IDB when offline, sync via FormData
through Axios on reconnect.

- compress-image.ts: Canvas API compression (max 1920px, JPEG 80%)
- offline-cae-service.ts: uploadFile, syncFileUpload, storage quota check
- cae-tab.tsx: handleFileUpload uses offlineCaeService (online + offline)
- video-record-dialog.tsx: videoBitsPerSecond 1Mbps cap

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: offline VT form — mutation queue + sync on reconnect (Session 3)

Queue VT field saves in IndexedDB when offline, sync automatically
via Axios (main thread) on reconnect with 30s polling interval.

- mutation-queue.ts: IDB CRUD with 5-retry limit
- sync-status.tsx: compact offline/pending/syncing/synced indicator
- use-sync-status.ts: polling hook for pending mutation count
- layout.tsx: SyncStatus component + online event listener + periodic sync

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: offline caching infrastructure — IDB schema + online status hook (Session 2)

- db.ts: IndexedDB schema with mutation-queue, offline-files, cae-cache stores
- constants.ts: cache TTL configuration
- use-online-status.ts: reactive hook for navigator.onLine state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: PWA foundation — installable app with service worker (Session 1)

Add web app manifest, Serwist service worker, install prompt banner,
and configure Next.js build pipeline for PWA generation.

- manifest.json: standalone terrain app with icons
- sw.ts: Serwist service worker with terrain-scoped caching
- install-prompt.tsx: bottom banner with 7-day dismiss cooldown
- next.config.mjs: wrapped with @serwist/next plugin
- Dockerfile.prod: copy public assets to standalone output
- Dependencies: @serwist/next, serwist, idb

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

revert: remove slide transitions, restore direct setAppState pattern

The navigate() wrapper div had no sizing (no h-dvh/flex/overflow),
breaking the flex height chain that screens depend on. This caused
CaptureScreen to render off-screen after PasswordGate and visually
blocked the receipt splitting UI.

Removes: navigate() helper, transitionClass/Key state, wrapper div,
slide keyframes, transition utility classes, and #root height override.

Keeps: safe area insets (07-01), touch targets (07-02), summary scroll
fix (min-h-0), and names preserved on Start Over.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Update result plots and add pressure field visualizations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Anthropic mode: prevent OpenAI fallback when Claude greeting fails

When Anthropic was overloaded, the greeting error handler fell through to the
`else` branch which triggered an OpenAI response.create — causing GPT to respond
instead of Claude. Changed `else` to `elif not use_anthropic` so OpenAI greeting
path is never taken in Anthropic mode. Added a static ElevenLabs fallback greeting
for when Claude is overloaded, keeping the call alive without GPT involvement.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix whitespace check for cross-bootstrap case (#46211)

Pass in the list of files via stdin rather than having julia
run `git` itself. The latter assumes the existance of a `git`
exectuable for the build environment, when we only want to
assume that one exists in the host environment. Fixes
check-whitespace when bootstrapping windows under wine.

Co-authored-by: Keno Fischer <Keno@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: 円グラフタイトルをシンプルな表示に変更・順序変更ボタンを追加

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix mobile audio by resuming AudioContext directly in touch handlers

Mobile browsers require AudioContext.resume() within a user gesture call
stack. The existing resume logic ran inside Phaser's game loop (rAF),
which doesn't qualify. Now each mobile touchstart calls
soundSystem.resumeOnInteraction() directly.

commit.message:
Fix 14 DSP issues across 6 engines: denormals, per-sample transcendentals, voice stealing, stereo collapse

DUB: add flushDenormal in ADSR decay/release, hoist glide coeff to block,
replace std::pow/std::sin/std::exp with fastExp/fastSin in render loop

DRIFT: add flushDenormal in ADSR decay/release, hoist glide coeff,
replace std::pow with fastExp for pitch/filter, cache PrismShimmer coefficient

BOB: add dustTape.reset() on voice stealing to prevent LP state bleed

FAT: fix G4 stereo reconstruction (signal-ratio → fixed gain distribution),
add full oscillator/filter/FX reset on voice stealing to prevent clicks

SNAP: replace per-sample std::pow with fastExp in unison detune loop
MORPH: replace per-sample std::sin with fastSin in LFO, std::pow with fastExp in detune

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Implement event card system: enforce all effects and add hex zone visuals

- Strikes 121/122: coast detection via BFS, block load/deliver at affected
  cities, disable UI buttons, show red ring+X markers on blocked cities
- Strike 123: block all players from moving on drawing player's track in
  pathfinding BFS, dim/dash struck track on map, block drawing player builds
- Tax: fix logging bug where deducted amount was read after mutation
- Derailments: use hex-hop BFS distance instead of Euclidean
- Snow: block movement through mountain/alpine mileposts in zone via BFS,
  block building in zone via findPath, mark blocked mileposts with red X
- Fog/Gale: block building in affected zones via findPath
- Snow/Fog/Gale: half-speed check uses hex distance
- Event zone visualization: hex-accurate convex hull borders with radial
  gradient fill, dashed glow border, labeled zone overlays on canvas
- Add helper functions: computeCoastDistances, getMilepostsInHexRange,
  isMilepostInEventZone, findNearestMilepost, convexHull, expandHull

commit.message:
Add Claude Code-like file editing and command execution

Implements full file editing system with three operational modes:
- Permissions: Ask before each change
- Plan: Show plan, approve once to execute all
- Auto-Approve: Automatically apply all changes

Features:
- File operations: read, write, create, delete with diffs
- Command execution: shell, swift, git, python with output
- Dangerous operation detection (rm -rf, sudo, etc.)
- FileOperationBubble & CommandOutputBubble UI components
- Mode selector in toolbar for easy switching
- File editing settings in preferences
- Integration with ChatManager for AI-powered workflows
- Operation history with pending/completed tracking

New managers:
- FileOperationManager: handles all file operations
- CommandExecutor: manages command execution
- OperationMode: enum for three operational modes

Updated ChatManager system prompt to inform Claude about
file editing capabilities based on current mode.

commit.message:
add Economics dashboard tab with Cloudflare Worker proxy

- New Economy tab: key rates (FRED), markets, events calendar, trend charts, news
- Cloudflare Worker (econ-proxy) proxies all data fetching server-side
  - Yahoo Finance for SPY/DIA/QQQ quotes and SPY chart history
  - CoinGecko for Bitcoin price
  - FRED API (secret) for rates, CPI, unemployment, GDP, mortgage
  - Google News RSS for headlines
  - Server-side in-memory cache (rates/charts 6h, markets 5min, news 30min)
- Browser-side cache (localStorage, 5min TTL) for instant repeat loads
- Inline SVG trend charts with 2% Fed target reference line
- Hardcoded FOMC/CPI/Jobs event calendar through 2026

commit.message:
Fix 4 bugs: fork cache key mismatch, JSON validation, config warning, thread-safe logging

- Fix --minimal --fork cache key mismatch: indel lookups used "-" but
  cache keys used empty strings, causing all indels to miss the cache
  and fall back to single-threaded annotation
- Fix JSON invalid numbers: add is_valid_json_number() validator for
  SIFT/PolyPhen scores, TSL, and custom annotation numeric values to
  prevent invalid JSON output from empty/malformed values
- Fix --config misleading message: now warns that config file support
  is not yet implemented instead of falsely claiming args were loaded
- Fix thread-unsafe std::localtime: use localtime_r for safe logging
  under --fork multi-threaded annotation

commit.message:
restructure to phase-per-task orchestration model (v2.1.0)

Replace single-Task orchestration with a state machine loop in the
command handlers. Each workflow phase is now a separate Task call,
with user approval gates happening in the main conversation context
where they cannot be skipped due to context budget limits.

- tdd.md: full state machine with CLARIFY → DESIGN → PLAN → APPROVAL
  → TICKETS → BUILD → COHERENCE → PR → DOCUMENT phases
- resume.md: reads current-phase.json and enters the loop at the right
  phase with a resume table
- ticket.md: single and multi-ticket workflows with state machine
- analyze.md, bootstrap.md: updated to use the new pattern
- lemongrab.md: demoted to reference documentation, still contains
  canonical workflow logic and state schemas
- plugin.json: bumped to v2.1.0

commit.message:
Fix Vercel serverless function to use BaseHTTPRequestHandler format

The previous dict-return pattern is not supported by Vercel Python runtime.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(orchestrator): count token usage from CLI stream-json result events (#11)

The orchestrator's extract_token_usage only recognized deeply nested
absolute totals (params.tokenUsage.total) and method-keyed turn/completed
payloads. Flat usage maps like {"input_tokens": N, "output_tokens": N}
from stream-json result events were silently ignored, resulting in zero
tokens counted for CLI sessions.

Add a flat_token_usage_map fallback that recognizes any map containing
integer token fields as a valid usage source, used after the existing
absolute and turn-completed extraction strategies.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Propagate R1 winners into bracket quarterfinals (#971)

## Summary
- All R1 matches are complete but the bracket shows "TBD" for every
quarterfinal matchup because the tournament JSON only stores seeds that
were explicitly set at match creation time — it doesn't backfill later
rounds with winners
- Add winner propagation in `buildTwoSidedBracket`: after loading
rounds, iterate forward and fill any null `seed_a`/`seed_b` from the
previous round's `winner_seed` using standard single-elimination pairing
(match pairs 2i and 2i+1 feed match i of the next round)
- Only fills null seeds, so it never overrides data already present in
the JSON — works correctly as the tournament progresses through QF → SF
→ Finals

## Test plan
- [x] `make check` passes
- [x] Verified QF matchups now show correct pairings on wide-screen
horizontal bracket (e.g. #1 Claude Opus 4.6 vs #9 Grok 4.1 Fast)
- [x] Verified QF matchups also display correctly in the linear
responsive bracket view
- [x] SF and Finals correctly remain TBD (no QF results yet)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Restrict teacher DM recipients to master_admin only

Teachers can now only message role_level=1 (master_admin) accounts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

drop support for CZMQ/ZMQ draft API

Draft socket types (CLIENT, SERVER, RADIO, DISH, SCATTER, GATHER)
fundamentally don't work with ZMQ_FD, making them incompatible with
cztop's I/O model. This is a known libzmq limitation (#2941, #3953).

Remove all draft socket types, draft FFI bindings, draft test helpers,
draft CI job, and the ci/ build scripts. The zmq_poller_* tests retain

fix: skip triple extraction for short messages, add error handling

- Skip triple extraction for messages shorter than 50 characters
- Add try-except to handle extraction errors gracefully
- Prevents infinite loops when LLM returns truncated responses

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: forward user session token to all EverSense API calls

EverSense uses Better Auth (cookie/bearer sessions) — unauthenticated
requests were being rejected. Now each route extracts the token from
the Authorization header and passes it through to eversense.js.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix+feat: Daily Briefing SITREP + APJC sub-region nav

Daily Briefing fix (two root causes):
- previewBriefing() never passed a date to the Worker when none was
  selected; Worker returns [] for date-less requests — now defaults
  to today and always sends the date parameter
- Worker returns {incidents:[]} but frontend expected json.sitrep
  (only present for admin-generated briefs); add client-side
  _buildSitrepFromIncidents() that builds the full SITREP structure
  (stats, key takeaways by country, escalations by category, Dell
  exposure, outlook, priorities) from raw incidents automatically

APJC sub-regions:
- Dark sub-nav strip appears below main nav when APJC tab is active
- 7 sub-regions: ANZ | Greater China | PAN India | Japan |
  South Korea | Malaysia & Singapore | South Asia & EM
- Single-select; clears automatically when switching away from APJC
- Filters both main feed and proximity alerts by country mapping
- APJC sub-region options also added to Daily Briefing region select

commit.message:
Fix mobile calendar scroll — tap-to-create instead of drag on touch

touch-action: pan-y restores vertical scroll on mobile. On touch devices,
tapping the calendar grid now opens the new event modal pre-filled at that
time instead of attempting a drag (which conflicts with scrolling).
Mouse drag-to-create remains on desktop.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Phase 9: Testing & integration hardening — 99 tests, admin UI, Docker production

- Add comprehensive pytest suite (99 tests, all passing) covering auth, projects,
  phases, tasks, documents, agents, and AI services
- Fix UUID binding for SQLite test compatibility (str→uuid.UUID conversion)
- Fix MissingGreenlet on project update (add db.refresh after flush)
- Add AdminSettings page with user management, roles, and system info
- Enhance Projects page with richer cards and modal creation form
- Add multi-stage Dockerfile, nginx reverse proxy, and production docker-compose
- Add .env.example with all required environment variables
- Configure CORS for multiple dev ports (3000, 3001, 5173)
- Serve frontend static files from backend in production mode

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Feat: production-grade daemon logging (stdout + rolling JSON file + OTel)

- Add tracing-appender for non-blocking daily-rolling file logs
- Orchestrator daemon: non-blocking stdout fmt + JSON file + OTel OTLP
- API daemon: non-blocking stdout fmt + JSON file (api.log.YYYY-MM-DD)
- Telemetry module rewritten: TelemetryGuard now holds WorkerGuards
  so buffers are always flushed on daemon shutdown
- CLI skips global subscriber init for daemon subcommands so each
  daemon can own its full subscriber stack without double-init panic
- Wire telemetry::init() into orchestrator run_daemon() (was dead code)
- Logs written to paths.log_dir(): /var/log/alexandria (system)
  or ~/.alexandria/logs (user install)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: official_tieba TLS 指纹反爬导致 httpx 超时，添加 curl fallback

百度贴吧 API 对 httpx/requests 的 TLS 指纹做了检测拦截，
httpx 请求会 ConnectTimeout（30s），但 curl 正常。
当 httpx 失败时自动通过 asyncio subprocess curl 重试。

The weekly page now feels like a chauffeur decision instrument,
not an event report.
